general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions related to state employee benefits.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>beginning on a specified date, establishes a paid time off program under which the following employees receive paid time off in lieu of annual leave and sick leave:<hr><ltbullet1>new agency employees; and <hr><ltbullet1>current agency employees who elect to participate; <hr><ltbullet>for each current agency employee who elects to participate in the program, directs the Division of Finance to convert the employee's accrued annual leave hours to paid time off hours at a one-to-one ratio;<hr><ltbullet>grants the Division of Human Resources authority to make rules governing the accrual and use of paid time off;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the 401(k) match available to a qualifying employee who participates in the paid time off program by changing the match rate and increasing the maximum employer contribution; <hr><ltbullet>requires each agency to establish and administer a leave bank program; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
